IReportRequestConfiguratorGetResponseType Method

One Identity Manager API Server
Returns the preferred response type for the report request, or null if the client has no preference.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Handling
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
